case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. FRANCISCO BUI ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2020

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUI, FRANCISCO $839.34 PRINCIPAL, $326.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,165.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100129461)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $326.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100129461) AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, FRANCISCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-28-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
